evals.prompt: Build a landing page for our new SaaS product.
evals.expected_output: Phase 0 Design Thinking first: (1) Purpose — what problem does the SaaS solve? (2) Tone — commit to one: brutally minimal / maximalist / editorial / luxury. (3) Differentiation — one thing users will remember. Then: pair display font + body font (not system defaults), choose dominant color + sharp accent, plan one orchestrated entrance animation, use gradient mesh or texture background.

evals.prompt: Create a dashboard UI with charts and data tables.
evals.expected_output: Commit to aesthetic: industrial/utilitarian or editorial/magazine for data-heavy dashboards. Typography: pair a distinctive monospace or condensed display font with clean body type. Spatial composition: generous negative space OR controlled density — never accidental middleground. Background: layer transparencies or subtle noise texture. Avoid: white background with generic Inter font.

evals.prompt: The design looks generic — it's just white background with purple gradient buttons like every other AI startup.
evals.expected_output: No purple-gradient-on-white — most overused AI aesthetic. Commit to something context-specific: (1) Choose a contrasting tone (dark editorial / retro-futuristic / brutalist). (2) Use a characterful display font (not Inter/Roboto). (3) One orchestrated entrance beat ten hover effects. (4) Break the grid intentionally with asymmetry or diagonal flow.

should_not_trigger: Write unit tests for the authentication service
Set up a CI pipeline with GitHub Actions
